methods.name: Stage-Progression
methods.rationale: Applies typical Series C → next-stage step-up multiplier (1.7x) to $1.4B total raised proxy.

methods.name: Peer-Median
methods.rationale: Median across 9 same-sector + same/adjacent-stage peers in Robotics & Manufacturing. Range: $300M - $10.0B.

private.name: Hadrian
private.rationale: Same sector (Robotics & Manufacturing), same stage (Series C), post-money $1.6B

private.name: Nimble Robotics
private.rationale: Same sector (Robotics & Manufacturing), same stage (Series C), post-money $1B

private.name: Foundation Robotics
private.rationale: Same sector (Robotics & Manufacturing), post-money $3B+ (reported, raise in progress)

data.narrative:
Neura Robotics is a Series C robotics and manufacturing company founded by David Reger, currently valued at €2.6B following $1.4B in total capital raised. The valuation assessment draws on a peer set of nine same-sector, same- or adjacent-stage companies, comprising eight private entities and one public comparable (277810.KQ), with valuations ranging from $300M to $10.0B.

Two triangulation methods were applied. Stage-progression analysis applied a 1.7x multiplier typical of Series C advancement to the $1.4B total raised proxy, implying a $2.4B valuation. Peer-median analysis across the nine-company robotics cohort yielded a $1.6B median valuation, with named comparables including Hadrian (Series C, $1.6B), Exotec (Series D, $2.0B), and 1X Technologies (Series B, $10.0B). The latter's elevated valuation reflects stage and market position variance within the peer set.

Triangulation of both methods supports a valuation range of $1.4B to $2.7B, with a median of $2.0B. The current €2.6B valuation ($2.8B at typical rates) sits at the upper bound of this range. Key uncertainties include the wide dispersion across peer valuations—particularly 1X Technologies' $10.0B outlier—and the limited public market data available for robotics subsectors. Stage timing and company-specific growth trajectories remain primary drivers of position within the estimated band.
